## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::SignpostBig;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        SignpostBig { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
bidirectional, left, right, east, west

## Categories
arrows, navigation, development, gaming
